About Me Experience Projects

A Little Bit About Me

Being an enthusiastic engineer, I am a full-stack web developer with a specialisation in back-end. Beyond software development, I love indulging in mathematics and complex algorithms questions.

Frameworks

Code

I am experienced with Java and NodeJS as back-end languages, and familiar with C++ as well.

Tools

Mumblecore hexagon kombucha, pitchfork four loko raclette intelligentsia master cleanse. Vinyl XOXO lumbersexual

Experience

Developed a full-stack chrome application using JavaScript, HTML & CSS to route print requests to a Label Printer. To be sold to external clients. Developed a system to visualise Kafka and Internal System metrics using Grafana, InfluxDB and Prometheus. Integrated Highly Structured Message logic into their WhatsApp Service.

Featured Projects

Face Swapping Telegram Bot

  • Python
  • Open CV

Built a face-swapping telegram bot using Python and OpenCV.

Check it out

Predicting Water Levels

  • Data Analysis
  • Auto-Caffe 2

Used auto-caffe 2 to build a model that predicts water levels one hour in advance based on current rainfall, in Singapore for an annual NUS datathon. We, as a team, won the overall second place and were the only freshmen winners.
